chapter_title.en: Divine concealment of sins as a mercy

text: ٣٠. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): الْحَذَرَ! الْحَذَرَ! فَوَاللهِ لَقَدْ سَتَرَ، حتَّى كَأَنَّهُ قَدْ غَفَرَ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 30. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Fear! Fear! By Allāh, He has hidden your sins so much so as though He has forgiven.
